---
title: "**MLB Daily Recap**"
output: pdf_document
#date: "`r Sys.Date()-1`"
---

```{r setup, echo=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, message = FALSE, warning = FALSE, eval = FALSE)
```

```{r, eval=TRUE, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, results='hide'}
library(dplyr)
library(baseballr)
library(mlbplotR)
library(gt)
library(gtsummary)
library(gtExtras)
library(glue)
library(rmarkdown)
library(ggplot2)
library(ggtext)
library(tidyverse)
library(magick)
library(cowplot)
library(egg)


#set directory and clear all previous png files
setwd("C:/Users/jkved/OneDrive/Desktop/Sports Analytics/MLB/Daily Recap PNG Files")
docs <- list.files(pattern = "*.png")
file.remove(docs)

```

```{r, eval=TRUE, echo=FALSE, fig.align = 'center', results='hide'}
#define date of recap
recap_date <- Sys.Date()-2

#pull game ids from yesterday
yest_game_ids <- mlb_game_pks(recap_date, level_ids = c(1))
#filter out any unfinished games
yest_game_ids <- yest_game_ids[which(yest_game_ids$status.detailedState == "Final"), ]

#load logos
teams_colors_logos <- mlbplotR::load_mlb_teams() |> 
  dplyr::filter(!team_abbr %in% c("AL", "NL", "MLB")) |> 
  dplyr::mutate(
    a = rep(1:6, 5),
    b = sort(rep(1:5, 6), decreasing = TRUE)
  )
#make updates to logo dataset abbreviations
teams_colors_logos$team_abbr[which(teams_colors_logos$team_abbr == 'AZ')] <- 'ARI'
teams_colors_logos$team_abbr[which(teams_colors_logos$team_abbr == 'CWS')] <- 'CHW'
teams_colors_logos$team_abbr[which(teams_colors_logos$team_abbr == 'KC')] <- 'KCR'
teams_colors_logos$team_abbr[which(teams_colors_logos$team_abbr == 'OAK')] <- 'ATH'
teams_colors_logos$team_abbr[which(teams_colors_logos$team_abbr == 'SD')] <- 'SDP'
teams_colors_logos$team_abbr[which(teams_colors_logos$team_abbr == 'SF')] <- 'SFG'
teams_colors_logos$team_abbr[which(teams_colors_logos$team_abbr == 'TB')] <- 'TBR'
teams_colors_logos$team_abbr[which(teams_colors_logos$team_abbr == 'WSH')] <- 'WSN'
#make updates to logo dataset team names
teams_colors_logos$team_name[which(teams_colors_logos$team_name == 'Oakland Athletics')] <- 'Athletics'


###GAME DATA 

#define variables to keep for game_ids
game_vars <- c('game_pk','officialDate','gameNumber','doubleHeader','dayNight','teams.away.score',
               'teams.away.leagueRecord.wins','teams.away.leagueRecord.losses','teams.away.team.id',
               'teams.away.team.name','teams.home.score','teams.home.leagueRecord.wins',
               'teams.home.leagueRecord.losses','teams.home.team.id','teams.home.team.name')
yest_game_ids <- yest_game_ids[,game_vars]

#add abbreviations to game data
yest_game_ids <- yest_game_ids %>%
  left_join(teams_colors_logos[,c(1,4)], by = c("teams.away.team.name" = "team_name")) %>%
  left_join(teams_colors_logos[,c(1,4)], by = c("teams.home.team.name" = "team_name"))
#fix column names
names(yest_game_ids)[which(names(yest_game_ids) == "team_abbr.x")] <- 'away_abbr'
names(yest_game_ids)[which(names(yest_game_ids) == "team_abbr.y")] <- 'home_abbr'

#remove doubleheaders for now until i can find a solution
yest_game_ids <- yest_game_ids[which(yest_game_ids$doubleHeader != "S"),]


###PITCHER DATA

#load pitcher data
yest_pitchers <- fg_pitcher_leaders(startseason = format(Sys.Date(),"%Y"),endseason = format(Sys.Date(),"%Y"),
                                    startdate = recap_date,enddate = recap_date,month = "1000",sortstat = "WAR")
#define pitcher variables to keep for leaderboards
pitcher_vars <- c("PlayerName","playerid","xMLBAMID","team_name","GS","Pitches","IP","TBF","W","L","SV"
                  ,"SO","BB","IBB","HBP","H","R","ER","HR","SwStr_pct","CStr_pct","pi_vFA","QS","SD","MD"
                  ,"WPA","pLI","WAR")
#keep only columns called out
yest_pitchers <- yest_pitchers[,pitcher_vars]
#calculate Whiffs
yest_pitchers$Whiffs <- round(yest_pitchers$Pitches * yest_pitchers$SwStr_pct,0)
#calculate Outs recorded
yest_pitchers$Outs <- (yest_pitchers$IP - round(yest_pitchers$IP, digits = 0))*10+round(yest_pitchers$IP, digits = 0)*3
#calculate game score v2
yest_pitchers$gsv2 <- (40 + 2*yest_pitchers$Outs + 1*yest_pitchers$SO - 2*yest_pitchers$BB 
                       - 2*yest_pitchers$IBB - 2*yest_pitchers$HBP - 2*yest_pitchers$H
                       - 3*yest_pitchers$R - 6*yest_pitchers$HR)
#add team logos to the data frame
yest_pitchers <- yest_pitchers %>%
  left_join(teams_colors_logos[,c(4,6)], by = c("team_name" = "team_abbr"))
#add opponents
yest_pitchers <- yest_pitchers %>%
  left_join(yest_game_ids[,c(16,17)], by = c("team_name" = "away_abbr")) %>%
  left_join(yest_game_ids[,c(16,17)], by = c("team_name" = "home_abbr"))
yest_pitchers$opponent <- NA
for (i in 1:nrow(yest_pitchers)) {
  if (is.na(yest_pitchers$home_abbr[i])) {
    yest_pitchers$opponent[i] <- paste("v", yest_pitchers$away_abbr[i], sep = " ")
  } else {
    yest_pitchers$opponent[i] <- paste("@", yest_pitchers$home_abbr[i], sep = " ")
  }
}

##add starter game scores to game data
yest_game_ids <- yest_game_ids %>%
  left_join(yest_pitchers[which(yest_pitchers$GS == 1), c(4,31)], by = c("away_abbr" = "team_name")) %>%
  left_join(yest_pitchers[which(yest_pitchers$GS == 1), c(4,31)], by = c("home_abbr" = "team_name"))
#fix column names
names(yest_game_ids)[which(names(yest_game_ids) == "gsv2.x")] <- 'away_gsv2'
names(yest_game_ids)[which(names(yest_game_ids) == "gsv2.y")] <- 'home_gsv2'



##BATTER DATA

#load batter data
yest_batters <- fg_batter_leaders(qual = "1",startseason = format(Sys.Date(),"%Y"),endseason = format(Sys.Date(),"%Y"),
                                  startdate = recap_date,enddate = recap_date,month = "1000",sortstat = "WAR")
#define batter variables to keep for leaderboards
yest_batters$TB <- yest_batters$`1B`+yest_batters$`2B`*2+yest_batters$`3B`*3+yest_batters$HR*4
#define batter variables to keep for leaderboards
batter_vars <- c("PlayerName","playerid","xMLBAMID","team_name","PA","H","HR","R","RBI","SB","CS","SO","BB","TB","Barrels","maxEV","WPA","pLI","WAR")
#keep only columns called out
yest_batters <- yest_batters[,batter_vars]
#add team logos to the data frame
yest_batters <- yest_batters %>%
  left_join(teams_colors_logos[,c(4,6)], by = c("team_name" = "team_abbr"))
#add opponents
yest_batters <- yest_batters %>%
  left_join(yest_game_ids[,c(16,17)], by = c("team_name" = "away_abbr")) %>%
  left_join(yest_game_ids[,c(16,17)], by = c("team_name" = "home_abbr"))
yest_batters$opponent <- NA
for (i in 1:nrow(yest_batters)) {
  if (is.na(yest_batters$home_abbr[i])) {
    yest_batters$opponent[i] <- paste("v", yest_batters$away_abbr[i], sep = " ")
  } else {
    yest_batters$opponent[i] <- paste("@", yest_batters$home_abbr[i], sep = " ")
  }
}



##### 1. Scoreboard

#function that will place team records underneath their logo using HTML
gt_mlb_stack <- function(data, logo, upper_text, lower_text1, lower_text2) {
  data %>%
    mutate(stack = glue(
      "<div style='display: flex; align-items: center;'>
           <img src='{eval(expr({{logo}}))}' style='height: auto; width: 30px; padding-right: 5px;'>
           <div>
             <div style='line-height:18px;'><span style='font-weight:bold;color:black;font-size:18px'>{eval(expr({{upper_text}}))}</span></div>
            <div style='line-height:10px;'><span style='font-weight:plain;color:grey;font-size:10px'>{eval(expr({{lower_text1}}))}-{eval(expr({{lower_text2}}))}</span></div>
         </div>"
    )    )
}

#function that will concisely display basic game stats
gt_mlb_stat_stack <- function(data, upper_text1, upper_text2, upper_text3, lower_text1, lower_text2, lower_text3) {
  data %>%
    mutate(stack = glue(
      "<div style='display: flex; align-items: center;'>
           </div>
             <div style='line-height:14px;'><span style='font-weight:plain;color:black;font-size:14px'>A:  {eval(expr({{upper_text1}}))} - {eval(expr({{upper_text2}}))} - {eval(expr({{upper_text3}}))}</span></div>
             <div style='line-height:14px;'><span style='font-weight:plain;color:black;font-size:14px'>H:  {eval(expr({{lower_text1}}))} - {eval(expr({{lower_text2}}))} - {eval(expr({{lower_text3}}))}</span></div>
           </div>
         </div>"
    )    )
}

#plot game scoreboard summary
plot_game_scoreboard <- function(game) {
  
  date <- recap_date
  
  #get game data
  game_data <- yest_game_ids
  
  #mlb game linescore data
  game_linescore <- mlb_game_linescore(game[1])
  #loop for all games
  for (i in 2:length(game)) {
    temp_game_linescore <- mlb_game_linescore(game[i])
    game_linescore <- rbind(game_linescore, temp_game_linescore)
    Sys.sleep(3)
  }
  #summarize data in full game stats
  game_linescore <- game_linescore %>%
    group_by(game_pk) %>%
    summarise(home_hits = sum(home_hits, na.rm = TRUE), away_hits = sum(away_hits, na.rm = TRUE), 
              home_errors = sum(home_errors, na.rm = TRUE), away_errors = sum(away_errors, na.rm = TRUE),
              home_LOB = sum(home_left_on_base, na.rm = TRUE), away_LOB = sum(away_left_on_base, na.rm = TRUE))
  #join with base game data
  game_data <- game_data %>% 
    left_join(game_linescore, by = "game_pk")
  
  #mlb game info
  #game_info <- mlb_game_info(game[1])
  #loop for all games
  #for (i in 2:length(game)) {
    #temp_game_info <- mlb_game_info(game[i])
    #game_info <- rbind(game_info, temp_game_info)
    #Sys.sleep(3)
  #}
  #define variables to keep
  #info_vars <- c("game_pk","venue_name","temperature","other_weather","wind","attendance"
                 #,"start_time","elapsed_time")
  #join with base game data
  #game_data <- game_data %>% 
    #left_join(game_info[,info_vars], by = "game_pk")
  
  #find winner of game for wp calc
  for (i in 1:nrow(game_data)) {
    if (game_data$teams.away.score[i] > game_data$teams.home.score[i]) {
      game_data$winner[i] <- 'A'
    } else {
      game_data$winner[i] <- 'H'
    }
  }
  #mlb win probability
  game_wp <- mlb_game_wp(game[1])
  game_wp$game_pk <- game_data$game_pk[1]
  game_wp$winner <- game_data$winner[1]
  #loop for all games
  for (i in 2:length(game)) {
    temp_game_wp <- mlb_game_wp(game[i])
    temp_game_wp$game_pk <- game_data$game_pk[i]
    temp_game_wp$winner <- game_data$winner[i]
    game_wp <- rbind(game_wp, temp_game_wp)
    Sys.sleep(3)
  }
  #calculate excitement, tension, and comeback metrics
  homeW_game_wp <- game_wp %>%
    filter(winner == "H") %>%
    group_by(game_pk) %>%
    summarise(Excitement = sum(abs(home_team_win_probability_added), na.rm = TRUE), 
              Tension = sum(leverage_index, na.rm = TRUE),
              Comeback = min(home_team_win_probability, na.rm = TRUE))
  awayW_game_wp <- game_wp %>%
    filter(winner == "A") %>%
    group_by(game_pk) %>%
    summarise(Excitement = sum(abs(home_team_win_probability_added), na.rm = TRUE), 
              Tension = sum(leverage_index, na.rm = TRUE),
              Comeback = min(away_team_win_probability, na.rm = TRUE))
  game_wp <- rbind(homeW_game_wp, awayW_game_wp)
  #re-scale metrics to 0-100
  for (i in 1:nrow(game_wp)) {
    #Excitement
    if (game_wp$Excitement[i] > 550) {
      game_wp$Excitement[i] <- 100
    } else {
      game_wp$Excitement[i] <- round(100*((game_wp$Excitement[i]-55)/(550-55)),1)
    }
    #Tension
    if (game_wp$Tension[i] > 160) {
      game_wp$Tension[i] <- 100
    } else {
      game_wp$Tension[i] <- round(100*((game_wp$Tension[i]-9)/(160-9)),1)
    }
    #Comeback
    if (game_wp$Comeback[i] > 60) {
      game_wp$Comeback[i] <- 0
    } else {
      game_wp$Comeback[i] <- round(100-(100*((game_wp$Comeback[i])/(60))),1)
    }
  }
  #join with base game data
  game_data <- game_data %>% 
    left_join(game_wp, by = "game_pk")
  
  #add team logos
  logo_vars <- c('team_name','team_logo_espn')
  game_data <- game_data %>%
    left_join(teams_colors_logos[,logo_vars], by = c("teams.away.team.name" = "team_name")) %>%
    left_join(teams_colors_logos[,logo_vars], by = c("teams.home.team.name" = "team_name"))
  #fix column names
  names(game_data)[which(names(game_data) == "team_logo_espn.x")] <- 'away_logo'
  names(game_data)[which(names(game_data) == "team_logo_espn.y")] <- 'home_logo'
  
  #add stacks
  game_data <- game_data %>%
    gt_mlb_stack(away_logo, teams.away.score, teams.away.leagueRecord.wins, teams.away.leagueRecord.losses)
  names(game_data)[which(names(game_data) == "stack")] <- 'away_stack'
  game_data <- game_data %>%
    gt_mlb_stack(home_logo, teams.home.score, teams.home.leagueRecord.wins, teams.home.leagueRecord.losses)
  names(game_data)[which(names(game_data) == "stack")] <- 'home_stack'
  game_data <- game_data %>%
    gt_mlb_stat_stack(away_hits, away_LOB, away_errors, home_hits, home_LOB, home_errors)
  names(game_data)[which(names(game_data) == "stack")] <- 'stat_stack'
  
  
  ###SCOREBOARD TABLE
  font <- 'PT Sans'
  
  #set titles
  title_text <- glue('MLB Scoreboard, {date}')
  #subtitle_text1 <- glue('{game_data$start_time}, {game_data$venue_name} (Attendance: {game_data$attendance})')
  title_header <- glue(
    "<div style='display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center;'>
       <div style='flex-grow: 1;'>
         <span style='font-weight: bold; font-size: 24px; line-height: 0.5;'>{title_text}</span><br>
       </div>
     </div>"
  )
  
  game_scoreboard_table <- game_data %>%
    #mutate(Hits = glue('{away_hits} - {home_hits}')) %>%
    #mutate(LOB = glue('{away_LOB} - {home_LOB}')) %>%
    #mutate(Errors = glue('{away_errors} - {home_errors}')) %>%
    select(away_stack,home_stack,stat_stack,away_gsv2,home_gsv2,Excitement,Tension,Comeback,winner) %>%
    gt(id = 'table') %>% 
    gt_theme_nytimes() %>% 
    cols_align(columns = everything(), 'center') %>% 
    cols_width(stat_stack ~ px(105), everything() ~ px(75)) %>%
    fmt_number(columns = c(Excitement,Tension,Comeback), decimals = 1) %>% 
    fmt_markdown(columns = c(away_stack,home_stack,stat_stack)) %>%
    gt_color_rows(c(away_gsv2,home_gsv2), palette = "RdYlGn", direction = 1, domain = c(-20,50,110), pal_type = "continuous") %>%
    gt_color_rows(c(Excitement,Tension,Comeback), palette = "RdYlGn", direction = 1, domain = c(0,50,100), pal_type = "continuous", alpha = 0.15) %>%
    tab_style(locations = cells_body(columns = c(away_stack,home_stack,stat_stack,away_gsv2,home_gsv2,Excitement,Tension,Comeback)), style = cell_borders()) %>% 
    tab_style(locations = cells_body(rows = 1), style = cell_borders(sides = "top", weight = px(2))) %>%
    #tab_style(locations = cells_body(columns = case_when(home_stack)), style = cell_fill(color = "#ebca66", alpha = 0.15)), 
              #winner == 'A' ~ tab_style(locations = cells_body(columns = away_stack), style = cell_fill(color = "#ebca66", alpha = 0.15))) %>%
    tab_options(data_row.padding = 3.5,
                source_notes.border.bottom.style = "solid",
                source_notes.border.bottom.color = "white",
                source_notes.font.size = 10) %>% 
    tab_header(title = html(title_header)) %>% 
    cols_hide(winner) %>%
    cols_label(away_stack = 'Away', home_stack = 'Home', stat_stack = 'Hits-LOB-Errors',
               away_gsv2 = "Away SP GS", home_gsv2 = "Home SP GS") %>% 
    tab_source_note(md("GS = Game Score (40+2xOuts+1xSO-2xBB-2xH-3xR-6xHR)<br>Excitement: Measures the total 'movement' in Win Probability (Scaled to be out of 100)<br>Tension: Measure of the total Leverage Index throughout the game (Scaled to be out of 100)<br>Comeback: Based off the lowest win probability during the game for the winning team (Scaled to be out of 100)")) %>%
    opt_css(
      "
        #table .gt_heading {
          padding-top: 6px;
          padding-bottom: 0px;
        }
        #table .gt_subtitle {
          padding-top: 2px;
          padding-bottom: 6px;
        }
        #table tbody tr:last-child {
        border-bottom: 2px solid #000000;
        }
        "
    )
  return(game_scoreboard_table)
}
#test game scoreboard function
#plot_game_scoreboard(yest_game_ids$game_pk)



##### 2. Player Leaderboards

#top batter performances plot function
plot_SPs <- function(pitcher_data) {
  
  date <- recap_date
  
  font <- 'PT Sans'
  #to_scale_number <- c(1:nrow(team_stats))
  #to_scale_number <- which(team_data$stat %in% c('avg_poss_length_off','avg_poss_length_def','adj_o','adj_d'))
  #to_scale_percent <- setdiff(1:nrow(team_data), to_scale_number)
  
  title_text = glue('Starting Pitcher Performances, {date}')
  subtitle_text1 <- glue('Sorted by Game Score, formula under table')
  
  title_header <- glue(
    "<div style='display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center;'>
       <div style='flex-grow: 1;'>
         <span style='font-weight: bold; font-size: 24px; line-height: 0.5;'>{title_text}</span><br>
         <span style='font-weight: normal; font-size: 16px; line-height: 0.5;'>{subtitle_text1}</span><br>
       </div>
     </div>"
  )
  
  top_pitcher_table <- pitcher_data %>% 
    filter(GS == 1) %>%
    arrange(-gsv2) %>%
    select(team_logo_espn,PlayerName,opponent,Pitches,IP,W,L,H,R,HR,BB,SO,Whiffs,WPA,pLI,WAR,gsv2) %>% 
    gt(id = 'table') %>% 
    gt_theme_nytimes() %>% 
    cols_move_to_start(team_logo_espn) %>% 
    cols_align(columns = c(everything(), -PlayerName), 'center') %>% 
    cols_align(columns = c(PlayerName), 'left') %>% 
    cols_width(PlayerName ~ px(135), opponent ~ px(70), c(WPA,pLI,WAR) ~ px(60)
               , c(team_logo_espn,IP,Pitches,Whiffs,gsv2) ~ px(50), everything() ~ px(35)) %>%
    fmt_number(columns = c(WPA,pLI,WAR), decimals = 3) %>% 
    fmt_image(team_logo_espn) %>%
    gt_color_rows(gsv2, palette = "RdYlGn", direction = 1, domain = c(-20,50,110), pal_type = "continuous") %>%
    gt_color_rows(c(WPA,WAR), palette = "RdYlGn", direction = 1, domain = c(-0.6,0.6), pal_type = "continuous") %>%
    tab_style(locations = cells_body(columns = c(team_logo_espn,PlayerName,opponent,Pitches,IP,W,L,H,R,HR,BB,SO,Whiffs,WPA,pLI,WAR,gsv2)), style = cell_borders()) %>% 
    tab_style(locations = cells_body(rows = 1), style = cell_borders(sides = "top", weight = px(2))) %>% 
    tab_options(data_row.padding = 3.5,
                source_notes.border.bottom.style = "solid",
                source_notes.border.bottom.color = "white",
                source_notes.font.size = 10) %>% 
    tab_header(title = html(title_header)) %>% 
    cols_label(team_logo_espn = '', PlayerName = 'Player') %>% 
    tab_source_note(md("WPA: Win Probability Added, pLI: Average Leverage Index, gsv2: Game Score (40+2xOuts+1xSO-2xBB-2xH-3xR-6xHR)<br>Leverage Index measures the importance of a particular event by quantifying the extent to which win probability could change on said event<br>")) %>%
    opt_css(
      "
        #table .gt_heading {
          padding-top: 6px;
          padding-bottom: 0px;
        }
        #table .gt_subtitle {
          padding-top: 2px;
          padding-bottom: 6px;
        }
        #table tbody tr:last-child {
        border-bottom: 2px solid #000000;
        }
        "
    )
  return(top_pitcher_table)
}
#test starting pitcher recap function
#plot_SPs(yest_pitchers)



#top batter performances plot function
plot_top_batters <- function(batter_data) {

  date <- recap_date
  
  font <- 'PT Sans'
  #to_scale_number <- c(1:nrow(team_stats))
  #to_scale_number <- which(team_data$stat %in% c('avg_poss_length_off','avg_poss_length_def','adj_o','adj_d'))
  #to_scale_percent <- setdiff(1:nrow(team_data), to_scale_number)
  
  title_text <- glue('Top Batter Performances, {date}')
  subtitle_text1 <- glue('"Top" based on WAR added in game')
  
  title_header <- glue(
    "<div style='display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center;'>
       <div style='flex-grow: 1;'>
         <span style='font-weight: bold; font-size: 24px; line-height: 0.5;'>{title_text}</span><br>
         <span style='font-weight: normal; font-size: 16px; line-height: 0.5;'>{subtitle_text1}</span><br>
       </div>
     </div>"
  )
  
  #color formatting
  palette <- 'ggsci::green_material'
  direction <- 1
  
  top_batter_table <- batter_data %>% 
    top_n(30, WAR) %>%
    gt(id = 'table') %>% 
    gt_theme_nytimes() %>% 
    cols_hide(c(team_name, playerid, xMLBAMID, home_abbr, away_abbr, Barrels)) %>% 
    cols_move_to_start(c(team_logo_espn, PlayerName, opponent)) %>% 
    cols_align(columns = c(everything(), -PlayerName), 'center') %>% 
    cols_align(columns = c(PlayerName), 'left') %>% 
    cols_width(team_logo_espn ~ px(50), PlayerName ~ px(150), opponent ~ px(70),
               c(maxEV,WPA,pLI,WAR) ~ px(60), everything() ~ px(35)) %>%
    fmt_number(columns = maxEV, decimals = 1) %>% 
    fmt_number(columns = c(WPA,pLI,WAR), decimals = 3) %>% 
    fmt_image(team_logo_espn) %>%
    gt_color_rows(WAR, palette = palette, direction = direction, pal_type = "continuous") %>%
    gt_color_rows(WPA, palette = palette, direction = direction, pal_type = "continuous") %>%
    tab_style(locations = cells_body(columns = c(team_logo_espn,PlayerName,opponent,PA,H,HR,R,RBI,SB,CS,SO,BB,TB,maxEV,WPA,pLI,WAR)), style = cell_borders()) %>% 
    tab_style(locations = cells_body(rows = 1), style = cell_borders(sides = "top", weight = px(2))) %>% 
    tab_options(data_row.padding = 3.5,
                source_notes.border.bottom.style = "solid",
                source_notes.border.bottom.color = "white",
                source_notes.font.size = 10) %>% 
    tab_header(title = html(title_header)) %>% 
    cols_label(team_logo_espn = '', PlayerName = 'Player') %>% 
    tab_source_note(md("WPA: Win Probability Added, pLI: Average Leverage Index, TB: Total Bases<br>Leverage Index measures the importance of a particular event by quantifying the extent to which win probability could change on said event<br>Barrels: Batted-ball events whose comparable hit types (in terms of exit velocity & launch angle) have led to a minimum .500 batting avg and 1.500 slugging pct")) %>%
    opt_css(
      "
        #table .gt_heading {
          padding-top: 6px;
          padding-bottom: 0px;
        }
        #table .gt_subtitle {
          padding-top: 2px;
          padding-bottom: 6px;
        }
        #table tbody tr:last-child {
        border-bottom: 2px solid #000000;
        }
        "
    )
  return(top_batter_table)
}
#test top batter recap function
#plot_top_batters(yest_batters)



##### 3. Game Summaries

#plot game win probability
plot_game_wp <- function(game) {
  
  #get game data
  game_data <- yest_game_ids[which(yest_game_ids$game_pk == game), ]
  
  #mlb game info
  game_info <- mlb_game_info(game)
  #define variables to keep
  info_vars <- c("game_pk","venue_name","temperature","other_weather","wind","attendance"
                 ,"start_time","elapsed_time")
  #join with base game data
  game_data <- game_data %>% 
    left_join(game_info[,info_vars], by = "game_pk")
  
  #add team colors for plot
  game_data <- game_data %>%
    left_join(teams_colors_logos[,c(1,11)], by = c("teams.home.team.name" = "team_name")) %>%
    left_join(teams_colors_logos[,c(1,11)], by = c("teams.away.team.name" = "team_name"))
  #fix column names
  names(game_data)[which(names(game_data) == "team_color.x")] <- 'home_color'
  names(game_data)[which(names(game_data) == "team_color.y")] <- 'away_color'
  
  #mlb win probability
  game_wp <- mlb_game_wp(game)
  
  #mlb pbp
  game_pbp <- mlb_pbp(game)
  
  #change data type of atBatIndex
  game_pbp$atBatIndex <- as.integer(game_pbp$atBatIndex)
  
  #keep only last pitch of an AB
  game_pbp$last_pitch_AB <- NA
  for (i in 1:nrow(game_pbp)) {
    if (game_pbp$index[i] == max(game_pbp$index[which(game_pbp$atBatIndex == game_pbp$atBatIndex[i])])) {
      game_pbp$last_pitch_AB[i] <- 'Y'
    } else {
      game_pbp$last_pitch_AB[i] <- 'N'
    }
  }
  game_pbp <- game_pbp[which(game_pbp$last_pitch_AB == 'Y'), ]
  
  #add score diff variable
  game_pbp$score_diff <- game_pbp$result.homeScore - game_pbp$result.awayScore
  
  #define pbp vars to keep
  pbp_vars <- c("atBatIndex", "result.homeScore", "result.awayScore", "score_diff", "about.inning")
  
  #join wp and pbp data
  game_wp <- game_wp %>%
    left_join(game_pbp[, pbp_vars], by = c("at_bat_index" = "atBatIndex"))
  
  #use previous score if no match from pbp
  for (i in 1:nrow(game_wp)) {
    if (is.na(game_wp$result.homeScore[i])) {
      game_wp$result.homeScore[i] <- game_wp$result.homeScore[i-1]
    }
    if (is.na(game_wp$result.awayScore[i])) {
      game_wp$result.awayScore[i] <- game_wp$result.awayScore[i-1]
    }
    if (is.na(game_wp$score_diff[i])) {
      game_wp$score_diff[i] <- game_wp$score_diff[i-1]
    }
    if (is.na(game_wp$about.inning[i])) {
      game_wp$about.inning[i] <- game_wp$about.inning[i-1]
    }
  }
  
  #create score label
  game_wp$score_label <- paste(game_wp$result.awayScore, game_wp$result.homeScore, sep = " - ")
  
  #create and fill in a variable to find if the score changed
  if (game_wp$score_label[1] == '0 - 0') {
    game_wp$score_change <- 'N'
  } else {
    game_wp$score_change <- 'Y'
  }
  for (i in 2:nrow(game_wp)) {
    if (game_wp$score_diff[i] == game_wp$score_diff[i-1]) {
      game_wp$score_change[i] <- 'N'
    } else {
      game_wp$score_change[i] <- 'Y'
    }
  }
  
  #create and fill in a variable to find if the inning changed
  game_wp$inning_change <- 'Y'
  for (i in 2:nrow(game_wp)) {
    if (game_wp$about.inning[i] == game_wp$about.inning[i-1]) {
      game_wp$inning_change[i] <- 'N'
    } else {
      game_wp$inning_change[i] <- 'Y'
    }
  }
  
  
  ###GAME WIN PROBABILITY CHART
  font <- 'PT Sans'
  
  #set titles
  title_text <- glue('{game_data$teams.away.team.name} ({game_data$teams.away.score}) @ {game_data$teams.home.team.name} ({game_data$teams.home.score})')
  subtitle_text1 <- glue('{game_data$start_time}, {game_data$venue_name} (Attendance: {game_data$attendance})')
  subtitle_text2 <- glue('{game_data$temperature}°F, {game_data$other_weather}, Wind: {game_data$wind}')
  title_header <- glue(
    "<span style='font-weight: bold; font-size: 24px; line-height: 0.5;'>{title_text}</span><br>"
  )
  subtitle_header <- glue(
    "<span style='font-weight: normal; font-size: 13px; line-height: 0.5;'>{subtitle_text1}</span><br>
    <span style='font-weight: normal; font-size: 13px; line-height: 0.5;'>{subtitle_text2}</span><br>"
  )
  
  #isolate plot variables
  plot_vars <- c("at_bat_index", "home_team_win_probability", "about.inning", "score_label", "score_change", "inning_change")
  
  #Win Prob Line Chart
  game_wp[,plot_vars] %>%
    ggplot(aes(x = at_bat_index, y = home_team_win_probability)) +
    geom_line(group = 1, color = ifelse(game_wp$home_team_win_probability>=50, game_data$home_color,
                                        game_data$away_color), linewidth = 1.1, alpha = 0.5) +
    geom_text(angle = 90, vjust = 1, nudge_y = ifelse(game_wp$home_team_win_probability>=75,-10,10),
              size = 10/.pt, aes(label=ifelse(score_change=="Y", score_label,""))) +
    scale_x_continuous(breaks = game_wp$at_bat_index, labels = ifelse(game_wp$inning_change=="Y" ,game_wp$about.inning,"")) +
    ylim(c(0,100)) +
    labs(x = "Inning", y = "Home Win Probability",
         title = title_header,
         subtitle = subtitle_header) +
    theme_bw() + 
    theme(
      panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
      panel.grid.minor.x = element_blank(),
      plot.title = element_markdown(),
      plot.subtitle = element_markdown()
    )
}
#plot_game_wp(yest_game_ids$game_pk[6])
                  

#plot game batter summary
plot_game_batters <- function(game, batter_data, team) {
  
  #get game data
  game_data <- yest_game_ids[which(yest_game_ids$game_pk == game), ]
  
  #add team abbreviations
  if (team == 'home') {
    game_data <- game_data %>%
      left_join(teams_colors_logos[,c(1,4)], by = c("teams.home.team.name" = "team_name"))
    
    team_name <- game_data$teams.home.team.name
  } else {
    game_data <- game_data %>%
      left_join(teams_colors_logos[,c(1,4)], by = c("teams.away.team.name" = "team_name"))
    
    team_name <- game_data$teams.away.team.name
  }
  
  ###GAME BATTER TABLE
  font <- 'PT Sans'
  
  #set titles
  title_text <- glue('{team_name} Batters')
  title_header <- glue(
    "<span style='font-weight: bold; font-size: 16px; align-items: center; line-height: 0.5;'>{title_text}</span><br>"
  )

  game_batter_summary <- batter_data %>% 
    filter(team_name == game_data$team_abbr) %>%
    arrange(-WPA) %>%
    select(PlayerName,PA,H,HR,R,RBI,BB,SO,SB,TB,WAR,WPA) %>%
    gt(id = 'table') %>% 
    gt_theme_nytimes() %>% 
    cols_align(columns = c(everything(), -PlayerName), 'center') %>% 
    cols_align(columns = c(PlayerName), 'left') %>% 
    cols_width(PlayerName ~ px(150), c(WAR,WPA) ~ px(60), everything() ~ px(35)) %>%
    fmt_number(columns = c(WAR,WPA), decimals = 3) %>% 
    gt_color_rows(c(WAR,WPA), palette = "RdYlGn", direction = 1, domain = c(-0.8,0,0.8), pal_type = "continuous") %>%
    tab_style(locations = cells_body(columns = c(PlayerName,PA,H,HR,R,RBI,BB,SO,SB,TB,WAR,WPA)), style = cell_borders()) %>% 
    tab_style(locations = cells_body(rows = 1), style = cell_borders(sides = "top", weight = px(2))) %>% 
    tab_header(title = html(title_header)) %>% 
    tab_options(data_row.padding = 3.5,
                source_notes.border.bottom.style = "solid",
                source_notes.border.bottom.color = "white",
                source_notes.font.size = 10) %>% 
    cols_label(PlayerName = 'Player') %>% 
    tab_source_note(md("WPA: Win Probability Added")) %>%
    opt_css(
      "
        #table .gt_heading {
          padding-top: 6px;
          padding-bottom: 0px;
        }
        #table .gt_subtitle {
          padding-top: 2px;
          padding-bottom: 6px;
        }
        #table tbody tr:last-child {
        border-bottom: 2px solid #000000;
        }
        "
    )
  return(game_batter_summary)
}
#test game scoreboard function
#plot_game_batters(yest_game_ids$game_pk[14], yest_batters, 'away')


#plot game batter summary
plot_game_pitchers <- function(game, pitcher_data, team) {
  
  #get game data
  game_data <- yest_game_ids[which(yest_game_ids$game_pk == game), ]
  
  #grab team name for title
  team_name <- NA
  
  #add team abbreviations
  if (team == 'home') {
    game_data <- game_data %>%
      left_join(teams_colors_logos[,c(1,4)], by = c("teams.home.team.name" = "team_name"))
    
    team_name <- game_data$teams.home.team.name
  } else {
    game_data <- game_data %>%
      left_join(teams_colors_logos[,c(1,4)], by = c("teams.away.team.name" = "team_name"))
    
    team_name <- game_data$teams.away.team.name
  }
  
  ###GAME PITCHER TABLE
  font <- 'PT Sans'
  
  #set titles
  title_text <- glue('{team_name} Pitchers')
  title_header <- glue(
    "<span style='font-weight: bold; font-size: 16px; align-items: center; line-height: 0.5;'>{title_text}</span><br>"
  )
  
  game_pitcher_summary <- pitcher_data %>% 
    filter(team_name == game_data$team_abbr) %>%
    arrange(-WPA) %>%
    select(PlayerName,Pitches,GS,IP,H,R,ER,HR,BB,SO,WAR,WPA) %>%
    gt(id = 'table') %>% 
    gt_theme_nytimes() %>% 
    cols_align(columns = c(everything(), -PlayerName), 'center') %>% 
    cols_align(columns = c(PlayerName), 'left') %>% 
    cols_width(PlayerName ~ px(150), c(Pitches,WAR,WPA) ~ px(60), everything() ~ px(35)) %>%
    fmt_number(columns = c(IP), decimals = 1) %>% 
    fmt_number(columns = c(WAR,WPA), decimals = 3) %>% 
    gt_color_rows(c(WAR,WPA), palette = "RdYlGn", direction = 1, domain = c(-0.8,0,0.8), pal_type = "continuous") %>%
    tab_style(locations = cells_body(columns = c(PlayerName,Pitches,IP,H,R,ER,HR,BB,SO,WAR,WPA)), style = cell_borders()) %>% 
    tab_style(locations = cells_body(rows = 1), style = cell_borders(sides = "top", weight = px(2))) %>% 
    tab_style(locations = cells_body(rows = which(GS == 1), columns = 1), style = cell_fill(color = "#ebca66", alpha = 0.15)) %>%
    tab_header(title = html(title_header)) %>% 
    cols_hide(GS) %>%
    tab_options(data_row.padding = 3.5,
                source_notes.border.bottom.style = "solid",
                source_notes.border.bottom.color = "white",
                source_notes.font.size = 10) %>% 
    cols_label(PlayerName = 'Player') %>% 
    tab_source_note(md("WPA: Win Probability Added<br>Starting pitcher highlighted in gold")) %>%
    opt_css(
      "
        #table .gt_heading {
          padding-top: 6px;
          padding-bottom: 0px;
        }
        #table .gt_subtitle {
          padding-top: 2px;
          padding-bottom: 6px;
        }
        #table tbody tr:last-child {
        border-bottom: 2px solid #000000;
        }
        "
    )
  return(game_pitcher_summary)
}
#test game scoreboard function
#plot_game_pitchers(yest_game_ids$game_pk[14], yest_pitchers, 'away')


```

```{r, eval=TRUE, echo=FALSE, fig.show = 'hide'}
##### PRINT ALL GAMES

#crop function
crop_gt <- function(file, whitespace) {
  image_read(file) %>% 
    image_trim() %>% 
    image_border("white", glue('{whitespace}x{whitespace}')) %>% 
    image_write(file)
}
#create data frame to store image names
images <- as.data.frame(NA)


#print scoreboard summary
image_scoreboard <- "yest_scoreboard.png"
gtsave(plot_game_scoreboard(yest_game_ids$game_pk), image_scoreboard)
crop_gt(image_scoreboard, '40')
images <- rbind(images,image_scoreboard)

#print starting pitcher summary
image_sp_summary <- "sp_summary.png"
gtsave(plot_SPs(yest_pitchers), image_sp_summary)
crop_gt(image_sp_summary, '40')
images <- rbind(images,image_sp_summary)

#print top batter summary
image_top_batters <- "yest_top_batters.png"
gtsave(plot_top_batters(yest_batters), image_top_batters)
crop_gt(image_top_batters, '40')
images <- rbind(images,image_top_batters)

#print summary tables for each game
for (k in 1:nrow(yest_game_ids)){
  
  #define teams
  teams <- as.vector(unlist(c(yest_game_ids[k,10], yest_game_ids[k,15])))
  
  #Game Win Probability
  image_game_wp <- paste(gsub("'","",teams[1]), paste("at", paste(gsub("'","",teams[2]), ".png", sep = "")))
  ggsave(image_game_wp, plot_game_wp(yest_game_ids$game_pk[k]))
  images <- rbind(images,image_game_wp)
  
  
  #Away Batters
  image_game_away_batters <- paste(gsub("'","",teams[1]), paste("Batters", ".png", sep = ""))
  gtsave(plot_game_batters(yest_game_ids$game_pk[k], yest_batters, 'away'), image_game_away_batters)
  crop_gt(image_game_away_batters, '40')
  
  #Home Batters
  image_game_home_batters <- paste(gsub("'","",teams[2]), paste("Batters", ".png", sep = ""))
  gtsave(plot_game_batters(yest_game_ids$game_pk[k], yest_batters, 'home'), image_game_home_batters)
  crop_gt(image_game_home_batters, '40')
  
  #combine batter images
  temp_away_batters <- ggdraw() + draw_image(image_game_away_batters, scale = 0.95)
  temp_home_batters <- ggdraw() + draw_image(image_game_home_batters, scale = 0.95)
  image_game_batters <- paste(teams[1], paste("at", paste(teams[2], paste("Batters", ".png", sep = ""))))
  ggsave(image_game_batters, ggarrange(temp_away_batters, temp_home_batters, nrow = 1))
  crop_gt(image_game_batters, '40')
  images <- rbind(images,image_game_batters)
  
  
  #Away Pitchers
  image_game_away_pitchers <- paste(gsub("'","",teams[1]), paste("Pitchers", ".png", sep = ""))
  gtsave(plot_game_pitchers(yest_game_ids$game_pk[k], yest_pitchers, 'away'), image_game_away_pitchers)
  crop_gt(image_game_away_pitchers, '40')
  
  #Home Pitchers
  image_game_home_pitchers <- paste(gsub("'","",teams[2]), paste("Pitchers", ".png", sep = ""))
  gtsave(plot_game_pitchers(yest_game_ids$game_pk[k], yest_pitchers, 'home'), image_game_home_pitchers)
  crop_gt(image_game_home_pitchers, '40')
  
  #combine pitcher images
  temp_away_pitchers <- ggdraw() + draw_image(image_game_away_pitchers, scale = 0.95)
  temp_home_pitchers <- ggdraw() + draw_image(image_game_home_pitchers, scale = 0.95)
  image_game_pitchers <- paste(teams[1], paste("at", paste(teams[2], paste("Pitchers", ".png", sep = ""))))
  ggsave(image_game_pitchers, ggarrange(temp_away_pitchers, temp_home_pitchers, nrow = 1))
  crop_gt(image_game_pitchers, '40')
  images <- rbind(images,image_game_pitchers)
  
}
```

```{r, eval=TRUE, echo=FALSE, fig.align = 'center', out.width="95%"}
images <- images[c(2:nrow(images)),]
knitr::include_graphics(images, error = FALSE)
```
